violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-coolerwas not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezer was not cleaned as frequently as required.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Wall mounted fan above dishes drying needs cleaned.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee Food prepper did not wash hands as necessary.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-cooler was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Air Conditioner vents was not cleaned as frequently as required.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Hand washing sink was blocked from use by plate/utensil tray. Removed
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Floors and ceilings were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
